name: Arcade
description: A sunlit aqueduct of stone arches marching in rows — every redraw re-springs the vaults and deepens different doorways.

code.style: --inner: @p(var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color2)); --rule: ( /* arch and doorway share one emitted stone color and width */ --stone: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --aw: @r(58, 76); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; height: @rand(62%, 88%); left: calc((100 - @var(--aw)) / 2 * 1%); width: calc(@var(--aw) * 1%); border-radius: 999px 999px 0 0; background: @var(--stone); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; height: @rand(34%, 52%); left: calc((100 - @var(--aw) * 0.56) / 2 * 1%); width: calc(@var(--aw) * 0.56%); border-radius: 999px 999px 0 0; background: var(--inner); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
